meta.note: Concrete design-keyword library for the detail-page skill. Consumed by scripts/keyword-picker.js; human-readable source is references/design-lexicon.md; the why is references/anti-ai-tells.md. Built from a 2024-2026 research corpus. anti_ai: HIGH=strongly escapes the generic AI center; MED=helps in context; LOW=hygiene or names the center itself (fence it, don't build identity on it).

hook.label: Hook / Hero
hook.purpose: stop the scroll in ~3s and install the one thesis; LOUD

empathy.label: Empathy / Pain
empathy.purpose: the customer's pain in their own concrete words; HUSHED

mechanism.label: Mechanism / Solution
mechanism.purpose: the single pivot where the product enters as the answer; MEDIUM

product.label: Product-visual / Deliverables
product.purpose: make the offer physically desirable and concrete

offer.label: Offer / Pricing
offer.purpose: present the deal with anchored value; ORDERED

feelings.note: 무게 — a big number earning its size

cta.label: CTA
cta.purpose: urgent decision; the page's ONLY saturation spike; LOUD

faq.label: FAQ / Guarantee
faq.purpose: practical reassurance and honest closure; QUIET

antiTells.tell: mono-label garnish (mono eyebrow on every row)
antiTells.counter: small caps / kicker in the text face / hanja garnish; reserve mono for real tabular data only
tone-on-tone, jewel tones, earth palette, warm paper ground, or shoot the color as gel light

antiTells.tell: giant ghosted outline numeral as decoration
antiTells.counter: type as container carrying real cargo, or a cropped/misregistered solid numeral
in-situ mockup, angled device photography, annotated real screenshot, insert shots
delete 80%; survivors get one meaning-tied treatment, or a typeset metadata line
score the pacing arc; alternate density/scale; break the grid at peaks
one material system (grain/halftone/paper) or real photography
real portraits with a consistent treatment, silhouettes, or a monogram/seal system
number only true sequences; else named chapters, a real anchored TOC, thematic titles
fold the eyebrow into the headline; open with a dateline, quote, or fact

antiTells.tell: rainbow discount badges / red countdown bombs / drop-shadow card grids
antiTells.counter: restate urgency as a calm fact (folio line); one monochrome trust row

antiTells.tell: uniform document-frame loop (same hairline rectangle as the only container — 3rd-gen of uniform chips)
antiTells.counter: cap identical border signatures at <=4/page and use >=2 non-border grouping devices (tint, whitespace, overlap); only ONE real scanned document artifact earns a frame

antiTells.tell: typeset fake hand-annotation (rotated serif slip cosplaying handwriting)
antiTells.counter: real scanned handwriting or brush calligraphy; if no real asset exists, honest typeset marginalia with zero rotation — never type tilted to fake a hand

antiTells.tell: archival-ephemera pastiche (simulated document world with zero captured artifacts — 3rd-gen attractor)
antiTells.counter: require >=1 real captured artifact per archival-genre section; count simulated-paper devices vs captured artifacts and flag when simulation wins

terms.def: earliest sans class with irregular squared closed-aperture letterforms
terms.effect: workmanlike industrial warmth, printed-object not tech-startup
terms.use_when: hero/body wanting confident plainness instead of Pretendard default

terms.def: rationalized mid-century grotesques with uniform neutral stroke
terms.effect: anonymous, systematic, invisible voice
terms.use_when: only where neutrality is the point, like wayfinding captions

terms.def: sans on Renaissance calligraphic proportions with open apertures
terms.effect: warm, literate, a person wrote this
terms.use_when: long-form body, testimonials, humane credibility

terms.def: near-pure circle/line construction (Futura, Avant Garde)
terms.effect: modernist, optimistic, machine-clean
terms.use_when: Deco/Bauhaus sections and numeric displays, not whole-page voice

terms.def: Renaissance serifs with angled stress, bracketed, low contrast
terms.effect: bookish humanist authority, centuries-of-print gravitas
terms.use_when: editorial body, essay sections, we-actually-read credibility

terms.def: 18th-c. serif between old-style and Didone, vertical stress
terms.effect: rational elegance, newspaper-of-record authority
terms.use_when: data-plus-prose, agenda tables, credibility blocks

terms.def: high-contrast serif with hairline horizontals, display-born
terms.effect: fashion-magazine glamour, expensive air
terms.use_when: one super-scale display headline/numeral, never body

terms.def: serifs as heavy rectangular blocks, poster-born, low contrast
terms.effect: sturdy vernacular hand-bill energy, loud without neon
terms.use_when: price/offer, deadline callouts, old-poster urgency

terms.def: bracketed slab with ball terminals, wanted-poster face
terms.effect: Victorian-Americana warmth, friendly authority
terms.use_when: FAQ headers, guarantee/refund sections

terms.def: ultra-bold Didone-derived display, grotesque weight vs hairline thins
terms.effect: circus-poster shout, maximal drama in one word
terms.use_when: single 1-2 word hook as the whole section

terms.def: stress inverted so horizontals thicker than verticals
terms.effect: deliberately wrong wild-west tension, unmissably intentional
terms.use_when: one disruptive section header when the page risks monotony

terms.def: broken-script Gothic (Fraktur, Textura)
terms.effect: heraldic, subcultural, certificate weight
terms.use_when: single accent word or seal motif, streetwear-adjacent

terms.def: display faces reproducing brush/marker strokes with entry/exit gestures
terms.effect: human hand present, speed and appetite
terms.use_when: one annotation layer over set type

terms.def: bridged-gap letterforms as if spray-cut through a template
terms.effect: utilitarian cargo/military crate physicality
terms.use_when: logistics/준비물/deliverables, anything implying physical goods

terms.def: exaggerated notches at letter junctions as a display style
terms.effect: print-machinery honesty made decorative, craft-rooted
terms.use_when: display sizes wanting modern without geometric blandness

terms.def: wide small-height caps with hairline serifs, banknote lineage
terms.effect: institutional, diploma-grade trust
terms.use_when: guarantee, credentials, instructor-bio headers

terms.def: fixed-width type
terms.effect: machine log, raw data
terms.use_when: only literal code/data, banned as decorative eyebrow

terms.def: distinct proportions/contrast drawn for text vs display sizes of one family
terms.effect: page reads typeset not scaled
terms.use_when: any serif/high-contrast family used at both small and huge sizes

terms.def: numerals with ascenders/descenders sitting in lowercase rhythm
terms.effect: numbers melt into text like words, bookish polish
terms.use_when: dates/quantities inside sentences and editorial copy

terms.def: uniform-width cap-height numerals aligning in columns
terms.effect: columns of times/prices lock in, numbers feel audited
terms.use_when: agenda tables, pricing, countdowns, 비교표

terms.def: purpose-drawn caps at x-height, slightly letterspaced
terms.effect: labels whisper instead of shout, understated formality
terms.use_when: the replacement for mono eyebrows, section labels and meta rows

terms.def: quotes/hyphens/periods pushed outside the margin for an optically straight edge
terms.effect: invisible refinement, machined-by-a-compositor feel
terms.use_when: pull quotes, justified or large-quote settings

terms.def: optional OpenType substitutions and swash forms per setting
terms.effect: a word becomes a drawn object, logotype quality without a logo
terms.use_when: one hero word or event name treated as a wordmark

terms.def: italic caps with extended flourished strokes
terms.effect: ceremonial flourish, invitation-card intimacy
terms.use_when: opening/closing lines, invitation-toned CTA

terms.def: Lubalin-school headline spacing where letters nearly kiss but never overlap
terms.effect: dense confident headline mass, bold via spacing not weight
terms.use_when: short punchy Latin/numeral headlines

terms.def: line spacing below 100% so display lines fuse into one mass
terms.effect: monolithic poster block, typography as architecture
terms.use_when: 3-4 line manifesto headlines, section openers replacing hero imagery

terms.def: body column at ~45-65 chars with generous margin
terms.effect: book-page intimacy, slows the reader on purpose
terms.use_when: story/philosophy sections between conversion blocks

terms.def: both-margin alignment with controlled spacing
terms.effect: newspaper/document gravity, text as a solid gray rectangle
terms.use_when: terms, syllabus, fine print where document-ness builds trust

terms.def: shaping the uneven right edge, breaking lines by phrase meaning
terms.effect: left-set text stops looking auto-flowed
terms.use_when: every 2+ line headline

terms.def: subhead on the same line as the paragraph's first sentence, weight/caps only
terms.effect: dense confident editorial texture, kills label-then-box rhythm
terms.use_when: FAQ, curriculum details, anywhere using chip+card repetition

terms.def: type set along a curve, circle, or arc
terms.effect: badge/emblem energy, hand-made composition
terms.use_when: seals, sticker moments, a circular text ring around a real photo

terms.def: a line rotated 90° along a layout edge like a book spine
terms.effect: print-poster architecture, activates dead edges
terms.use_when: section numbers/running titles along the viewport edge

terms.def: multiple typefaces within one line or word (Dada/punk collage)
terms.effect: cut-and-paste urgency, zine energy
terms.use_when: one rebellious headline max per page

terms.def: animating or stepping weight/width/slant axes across states or scroll
terms.effect: type that breathes, one family generating its own drama
terms.use_when: progress indicators, hover states, weight-ramp headlines

terms.def: deliberate casing registers across hierarchy levels
terms.effect: voice modulation, shouted/spoken/whispered become audible
terms.use_when: define the register system first, caps only for the single CTA verb

terms.def: letterforms drawn once for one word, not a font
terms.effect: unrepeatable, ownable, a literal human artifact in the page
terms.use_when: the event wordmark or one hero hangul word, once; if not affordable, fall back to named-face-stack — never a filtered system serif

terms.def: brush-derived contrast hangul with 부리 terminals
terms.effect: literary sincerity, premium warmth, opposite of app-UI voice
terms.use_when: headlines and long copy on story/emotional sections

terms.def: monoline hangul sans, the KR UI default
terms.effect: neutral, contemporary, app-like
terms.use_when: UI elements and captions only, must not carry the voice

terms.def: ultra-heavy hangul display gothic for headlines and old-print emphasis
terms.effect: 1980-90s Korean print punch, vernacular urgency
terms.use_when: retro-newsprint promos, price/deadline shouts

terms.def: hangul freed from the square frame (안상수체 lineage)
terms.effect: experimental, design-literate Korean modernism
terms.use_when: manifesto headlines for design-aware audiences

terms.def: hangul/hanja top-to-bottom, columns right-to-left
terms.effect: pre-modern gravity, literary ceremony, acts like a seal or spine label
terms.use_when: one heritage moment: epigraph, certificate, closing statement, edge-rail

terms.def: mid-century hand-painted hangul shop-sign forms with thick uneven strokes
terms.effect: 장인/노포 authenticity, analog-city warmth
terms.use_when: 현장/craftsmanship narratives, anti-corporate tone

terms.def: formal brush-script hangul from Joseon court calligraphy
terms.effect: solemn, or deadpan-serious irony in modern web use
terms.use_when: genuinely ceremonial lines or one knowing humor beat

terms.def: hangul modeled on 15th-c. woodblock printing
terms.effect: founding-document authority, museum-grade Koreanness
terms.use_when: heritage branding, opening declarations, seal lockups

terms.def: one-off brush-written hangul with 갈필 dry-brush texture over set type
terms.effect: breath and body, emotional-peak marking
terms.use_when: the single most emotional claim, once

terms.def: selective Chinese characters for key concepts (現場, 記錄)
terms.effect: masthead gravitas, intellectual density
terms.use_when: section markers in an editorial-heritage system

terms.def: rules for KR/Latin/numeral cohabitation with matched weight and role per script
terms.effect: the KR/EN seam disappears, internationally art-directed
terms.use_when: 한글 owns emotion, EN owns data, one consistent secondary style

terms.def: narrow-width display or vertically stretched Korean set
terms.effect: urgency, poster energy, controlled shouting
terms.use_when: agenda timelines, posters-within-page, date/venue lockups

terms.def: smaller content set inside the counters of a giant glyph
terms.effect: the big glyph earns its size by carrying cargo
terms.use_when: the one big numeral the page deserves, as a working vessel

terms.def: a short category line above a headline, in the text typeface not decorative mono
terms.effect: newsroom taxonomy, not techwear garnish
terms.use_when: only when the category adds information

terms.def: 3-4 adjacent hues on the wheel
terms.effect: enveloping atmospheric harmony
terms.use_when: mood-setting hero/closing where calm immersion beats contrast

terms.def: base hue plus the two hues flanking its complement
terms.effect: vibrant but controllable tension
terms.use_when: energy across sections without one screaming accent

terms.def: two complementary pairs with one hue dominant
terms.effect: festival-poster abundance when area-weighted
terms.use_when: multi-track agenda/lineup where each track earns a hue

terms.def: an image remapped to exactly two inks, shadows to A and highlights to B
terms.effect: photography becomes graphic, unifies mixed-quality photos into brand voice
terms.use_when: real event/speaker photos of varying quality, one ink pair sitewide

terms.def: one hue across a lightness/chroma ladder with hue drift, no black or white
terms.effect: quiet luxury, dyed-in-the-cloth richness
terms.use_when: premium sections, keeping a color identity without kelly+black

terms.def: deep saturated mid-value gem hues, emerald, sapphire, ruby, amethyst
terms.effect: opulent, nocturnal, velvet-curtain
terms.use_when: evening/live-event framing, premium theater mood

terms.def: desaturated minerals, terracotta, ochre, umber, sand, moss with warm gray undertone
terms.effect: grounded, tactile, artisanal trust, anti-digital by temperature
terms.use_when: craftsmanship, 현장, sustainability narratives

terms.def: fluorescent-adjacent saturated hues at flood scale
terms.effect: rave shock, now shorthand for AI trying to look bold
terms.use_when: almost never as field, a 2% sliver inside a muted system

terms.def: chalky tints plus rough texture and heavy near-black type
terms.effect: soft but not sweet, nursery colors with zine attitude
terms.use_when: approachable-but-credible education, softening hard topics

terms.def: upper lightness range only, whites and pales, no darks except type
terms.effect: airy morning-light optimism, enormous perceived whitespace
terms.use_when: opening sections, fresh-start positioning

terms.def: lower lightness range with small bright apertures, three different near-blacks
terms.effect: cinema-dark intimacy, anything light becomes precious
terms.use_when: studio-at-night live framing, countdowns

terms.def: large hard-edged solid planes meeting without transition
terms.effect: architectural confidence, sections become rooms
terms.use_when: chapter differentiation if proportions vary asymmetrically

terms.def: one premixed ink plus black plus paper as the whole palette (Pantone logic)
terms.effect: letterpress economy, restraint reads as conviction
terms.use_when: whole-page systems

terms.def: Klein's patented matte ultramarine (~#002FA7) as a total field
terms.effect: art-historical monastic intensity, a blue with an author
terms.use_when: one immersive full-bleed pause section

terms.def: owning one precise repeated hue (Hermès orange class) with all else neutral
terms.effect: instant recognizability, luxury discipline
terms.use_when: pick the exact hue before design, identical use on CTA/seal/rule

terms.def: translucent inks over each other where overlaps create a third darker color
terms.effect: layered depth with honest color logic
terms.use_when: Venn diagrams, image-over-type, duotone stacks

terms.def: a 95%+ low-chroma palette with one saturated element per viewport
terms.effect: the accent detonates, color equals information
terms.use_when: CTA discipline page-wide

terms.def: grays with visible hue bias, never neutral #808080
terms.effect: alive atmospheric neutrals, page feels lit not rendered
terms.use_when: all gray UI, pick a temperature and commit

terms.def: pure white replaced by ivory, cream, oatmeal, or kraft
terms.effect: print-object materiality, screens stop glowing
terms.use_when: default ground for editorial/heritage, pure white only inside photos

terms.def: darks mixed as very dark hues (blue-black, brown-black) never #000
terms.effect: ink depth, darks harmonize instead of sitting outside
terms.use_when: every dark element, text and grounds

terms.def: traditional Korean five colors 청·적·황·백·흑
terms.effect: ceremonial Koreanness, festive patched, gravity sparse
terms.use_when: heritage positioning, 명절 timing, cultural content

terms.def: temple-eave scheme, 뇌록 green ground with cinnabar/cobalt/gamboge/white
terms.effect: ornate sacred rhythm, Korean maximalism with strict rules
terms.use_when: borders, pattern bands, festival accents on heritage pages

terms.def: colors of traditional dyestuffs, jjok indigo, gardenia yellow, madder red
terms.effect: hanbok-cloth softness, heritage without loudness
terms.use_when: calmer KR-heritage palettes where 오방색 would shout

terms.def: colors pulled 30-60% toward gray, sage, clay, oatmeal, slate
terms.effect: grown-up, photographic, material
terms.use_when: whole-page base for premium, lets real photography sit

terms.def: the page's 4-5 colors sampled from the hero photo itself
terms.effect: uncanny cohesion, UI and imagery share DNA
terms.use_when: photography-led pages, ground from shadows and accent from the brightest object

terms.def: tint/shade ladders built in OKLCH for perceptually even steps
terms.effect: ramps without dead or neon steps, dark-mode stays on-brand
terms.use_when: engineering any palette into tokens

terms.def: a color shifts appearance by its surround
terms.effect: one ink reads as two, explains per-section accent shifts
terms.use_when: test the accent on every ground it touches

terms.def: two saturated equal-luminance hues adjacent so edges shimmer (Op-art)
terms.effect: electric intentional discomfort
terms.use_when: tiny doses, a LIVE badge or a hover

terms.def: a monochrome photo with one element kept or re-inked in a hue
terms.effect: sin-city focus, the colored object becomes the subject
terms.use_when: product/prop emphasis inside real photography

terms.def: blockbuster grade, shadows to teal and skin/highlights to orange
terms.effect: photos read cinema, unifies a mixed set
terms.use_when: mixed-source photos needing one filmic treatment, low intensity

terms.def: grading to a named negative stock, Kodak Portra skin tones and muted greens
terms.effect: human nostalgic warmth with named-referent precision
terms.use_when: all people photography on trust pages

terms.def: one large text block per page with generous asymmetric margins, book-like
terms.effect: slows the reader, literary seriousness
terms.use_when: maker story, founder letter, long-form 공감

terms.def: 2-6 columns with elements spanning different counts
terms.effect: order with variety, a system felt and used differently per section
terms.use_when: any multi-section page, vary span per section

terms.def: columns plus flowlines creating repeatable modules
terms.effect: dense information feels curated, catalog-like
terms.use_when: curriculum tables, deliverables walls

terms.def: an invisible vertical rhythm every line and block locks to
terms.effect: subliminal calm, mixed sizes feel related
terms.use_when: mixed KR/Latin type at multiple sizes

terms.def: a visible grid that 1-2 elements deliberately violate
terms.effect: tension reads authored because the underlying order stays legible
terms.use_when: exactly one climactic section, a reveal or offer

terms.def: unequal weights equilibrated by position
terms.effect: dynamic, editorial, alive, symmetric equals template
terms.use_when: hero/openers with headline mass off-axis

terms.def: groups of 3 or 5 with one dominant, not even pairs
terms.effect: one protagonist, composed not inventoried
terms.use_when: benefits, credentials, proof, item 1 at 2x size

terms.def: key elements on the implied square folded from the short side
terms.effect: feels right without being centered or thirds-obvious
terms.use_when: positioning headline/subject in full-bleed heroes

terms.def: a ~61.8/38.2 split for content/margin or image/text
terms.effect: classical inevitability vs arbitrary 50/50
terms.use_when: two-element sections

terms.def: image or color runs to all edges with zero container padding
terms.effect: immersion and confidence, un-boxed
terms.use_when: one hero photo plus at most one mid-page break

terms.def: deliberately extreme or unequal margins as a statement
terms.effect: luxury, emptiness reads as paid-for real estate
terms.use_when: premium sections, price reveal, closing statement

terms.def: an element straddling grid zones or overlapping a neighbor
terms.effect: depth by occlusion, no drop shadows
terms.use_when: photo+caption pairs, headline over an image edge

terms.def: a section organized along a tilted implied line
terms.effect: motion and urgency without animation
terms.use_when: agenda/timelines, before-after transitions

terms.def: adjacent elements at 10x+ size difference
terms.effect: visceral hierarchy, a shout and a whisper
terms.use_when: the one number or word carrying the argument

terms.def: an unequal rounded-tile mosaic, escaped by removing borders and bleeding content between cells
terms.effect: standard bento reads AI, the broken version regains authorship
terms.use_when: feature roundups only if cells become truly unequal

terms.def: eye path on sparse screens, top-left to top-right to diagonal to bottom-right
terms.effect: a predictable CTA landing zone
terms.use_when: hero and sparse sections ending in a button

terms.def: text-heavy path, two sweeps plus a left-edge skim
terms.effect: front-loads meaning, first words of lines get read
terms.use_when: curriculum, FAQ, long 증명, payoff word first per line

terms.def: emptiness treated as purchased space isolating one element
terms.effect: the isolated element gains value, page reads premium
terms.use_when: around the single accent moment, price, or brand name

terms.def: body text wrapping an image contour (shape-outside), magazine style
terms.effect: type and image physically coexist, print-native
terms.use_when: maker story with a cut-out portrait or silhouette

terms.def: hero as a magazine cover, dominant image, masthead, one big cover line
terms.effect: a published-periodical artifact, not a landing page
terms.use_when: event heroes where the event is Issue 01; coverlines cluster as one block — see coverline-block

terms.def: magazine double-page grammar, dominant image, cross-column headline, drop cap, pull-quote
terms.effect: reads as published journalism with hierarchy opinions
terms.use_when: instructor story or long-form 왜 as a feature

terms.def: two adjacent sections designed as one composition, an element resolving across the break
terms.effect: scroll momentum, sections become pages of one story
terms.use_when: 공감 to 해결 transitions, a rule crossing the section break

terms.def: a sentence lifted from body, reset at display scale, breaking the column
terms.effect: skimmers get the thesis, a second louder voice, a scale event
terms.use_when: testimonials/story, the customer's most specific sentence at 4x

terms.def: small margin annotations keyed to the text (Tufte-style)
terms.effect: scholarly intimacy, density without clutter, two voices
terms.use_when: caveats, survey n's, 왜 이 가격인가 honesty beside claims

terms.def: a designed index with real anchors, folio numbers, dot leaders
terms.effect: publication feel, respect signal, self-selection
terms.use_when: long pages of 8+ sections

terms.def: a running page number plus publication name at a fixed edge
terms.effect: persistent print-artifact identity, orientation without a progress bar
terms.use_when: a fixed corner element incrementing per section

terms.def: the publication name as a fixed typographic monument
terms.effect: institutional authority, the event becomes a title
terms.use_when: top of page only at that scale

terms.def: a 1-3 sentence intro between headline and body at intermediate size, written as argument
terms.effect: carries skimmers across each fold, real 3-tier hierarchy
terms.use_when: under every major headline

terms.def: a first letter or syllable enlarged to 3+ lines, embedded in the block
terms.effect: the story starts here, strongest one-character print cue
terms.use_when: opening of the one long-form story, once per page

terms.def: alternating Q/A exchanges in distinct typographic voices
terms.effect: claims become testimony, the reader eavesdrops
terms.use_when: speaker intro, FAQ upgrade, 증명

terms.def: a strip or grid of small sequential frames with sprocket edges, one grease-penciled select
terms.effect: implies abundance of real material plus an editor's choice
terms.use_when: 현장 사진, recaps, deliverable iterations

terms.def: museum/specimen presentation, object on a neutral field, plate number, precise caption
terms.effect: any item becomes an artifact, caption precision transfers credibility
terms.use_when: deliverables wall, each item a numbered plate with real specs

terms.def: numbered superscripts on claims linking to small-type sources at the section foot
terms.effect: marketing claims inherit academic accountability
terms.use_when: 통계·성과 claims, price conditions

terms.def: every image captioned with specific who/where/when in one consistent small style
terms.effect: photos become evidence with provenance, filler images die
terms.use_when: all photography, dated and specific

terms.def: an end block naming who made this, with what typefaces and tools, when
terms.effect: closes the artifact like a book, craft transparency
terms.use_when: footer, replacing the link farm

terms.def: a subject cropped so it runs off the frame or viewport edge
terms.effect: the subject reads larger than the page, contained equals timid
terms.use_when: hero portraits, product shots, large numerals cut by the edge

terms.def: near-instant start with exponential deceleration
terms.effect: snappy without bounce, expensive-feeling settle
terms.use_when: default entrance for premium or assured moods

terms.def: damped-spring motion with slight overshoot and settle
terms.effect: physical mass, playful on interaction
terms.use_when: drag/toggle/drawer only, never scroll-triggered text

terms.def: a small counter-movement before the main action (Disney principle)
terms.effect: the main motion reads intentional
terms.use_when: CTA press states, counters that dip first, accordion opens

terms.def: secondary parts keep moving briefly on offset timing
terms.effect: organic, layered motion
terms.use_when: card entrances where image lands then caption drifts

terms.def: siblings animate with a fixed per-item delay (40-90ms)
terms.effect: rhythm and reading order
terms.use_when: restrict to one list, or consider zero entrance as the distinctive choice

terms.def: a reveal via an animated clipping mask with image scaling inside
terms.effect: editorial page-uncovered vs generic fade
terms.use_when: hero images, big pull-quotes, chapter breaks

terms.def: progress bound 1:1 to scroll position
terms.effect: time becomes tactile, the reader in physical control
terms.use_when: one hero-grade sequence per page max

terms.def: a section pins while scroll steps advance discrete narrative beats
terms.effect: one idea at a time gets full attention
terms.use_when: the single hardest-to-explain concept, exactly one per page

terms.def: an auto-scrolling strip at constant linear speed
terms.effect: abundance/liveness, but now template shorthand
terms.use_when: rarely, only genuinely rotating content like a live 신청 feed

terms.def: a stat animates to its final value on scroll-in
terms.effect: the number is witnessed, so it is evidence
terms.use_when: proof metrics, ease-out landing, tabular-nums

terms.def: layers at slightly different scroll speeds, small offset, two layers max
terms.effect: quiet depth without theme-park
terms.use_when: full-bleed photographic sections only, never text

terms.def: one deliberate specific hover per element family, underline draws or B&W to color
terms.effect: someone cared about the 2% interactions
terms.use_when: links, cards, CTA, not generic lift+shadow

terms.def: an element continuously transforms between states instead of cut or crossfade
terms.effect: object identity preserved, UI feels solid
terms.use_when: tab switches, card to detail expansion

terms.def: one headline whose motion enacts its meaning, weight ramping on entry
terms.effect: the word performs itself, memorable because singular
terms.use_when: hero or pivot claim only, must couple to semantics

terms.def: a still photo with a very slow continuous zoom or pan
terms.effect: the photo acquires cinema's breathing
terms.use_when: full-bleed photographic heroes or backdrops

terms.def: a tokened scale, small fast and large slow, three tiers only
terms.effect: one physical system with mass, not equal pops
terms.use_when: define once before animating and audit against it

terms.def: constant speed exclusively for conveyor content
terms.effect: machine not gesture, correct for infinite or systemic content
terms.use_when: marquees, real-progress bars, countdown ticks

terms.def: a headline enters line-by-line from behind overflow masks
terms.effect: theatrical arrival
terms.use_when: hero H1 only, line-mask variant

terms.def: an element fixed while siblings scroll past, anchor plus stream
terms.effect: a two-speed page equals inherent compositional variation
terms.use_when: long curriculum/FAQ, pin the title or CTA card

terms.def: a tiny blurred placeholder sharpens into the full image
terms.effect: perceived speed plus a focus-pull moment
terms.use_when: every content photo on image-heavy pages

terms.def: the scroll designed as a timed sequence with one held moment, all else quiet
terms.effect: pacing like edited film
terms.use_when: plan on paper per-section before building

terms.def: an image or section scales subtly as the user scrolls into it
terms.effect: the viewer is drawn into content, approach implies importance
terms.use_when: entering the core-offer section, the 본론 transition

terms.def: a wide opening shot situating the audience in a place, full-bleed environmental hero
terms.effect: the reader knows where before reading anything, credibility of place
terms.use_when: page-opening hero for anything with a real venue or scene

terms.def: a detail fills the frame, hands, tool edge, texture pores
terms.effect: intimacy and evidence, you cannot fake this close
terms.use_when: proof sections, deliverable, tool, instructor's hands

terms.def: a brief cutaway to a significant detail object, a note, receipt, dial
terms.effect: tangible evidence punctuation, rhythm like a comma
terms.use_when: between long text, one small photographed detail instead of an icon

terms.def: a subject on the intersections of a 3x3 grid, not dead center
terms.effect: tension and direction, centered equals static template
terms.use_when: hero composition, anywhere AI would center the headline

terms.def: lines in image or layout physically pointing at the subject
terms.effect: the eye is steered not asked, the CTA feels arrived-at
terms.use_when: crop photography whose internal lines aim at the headline or button

terms.def: one plane sharp, everything else soft blur discs
terms.effect: physically impossible in vector, certifies a camera was present
terms.use_when: instructor portraits, product heroes, venue atmosphere

terms.def: the focal plane shifts between subjects, on web blur swaps between stacked layers
terms.effect: attention physically pulled A to B
terms.use_when: before/after, problem/solution as layered photographs

terms.def: extreme light-dark modeling, subjects emerging from deep shadow
terms.effect: gravitas, spotlight reverence, mastery and stakes
terms.use_when: instructor authority sections, 진짜 이야기 turning points

terms.def: consecutive sections changing register violently with no transition
terms.effect: attention jolted awake, edited-by-a-human
terms.use_when: act breaks, after image-dense proof cut to a stark screen

terms.def: a form in one section echoed transformed in the next
terms.effect: sections authored as one continuous thought
terms.use_when: problem to solution links, a falling curve returns rising

terms.def: a dense burst of many small real photos or screens after long single-image pacing
terms.effect: volume and momentum in one glance
terms.use_when: track record, 20+ small real images beat 3 mockups

terms.def: an image or block set 2-5° off-axis with intent
terms.effect: unease, energy, grid disruption
terms.use_when: problem sections, one rotated element against a strict grid

terms.def: a horizontal blue streak from cinema glass hit by point lights
terms.effect: shot-on-cinema-glass in one streak
terms.use_when: sparingly, on one real light source in a hero

terms.def: a visible in-frame light source doing real illumination, lamp, monitor, neon
terms.effect: the scene explains its own light, documentary-true
terms.use_when: workspace/현장 direction, faces lit by their monitors

terms.def: film-emulsion highlight bleed, a reddish-orange glow (CineStill look)
terms.effect: warm chemical highlights vs digital clipping, analog nostalgia
terms.use_when: night/neon/screen-glow treatments, shot-on-film heroes

terms.def: imagery or sections cropped to widescreen cinema proportions with optional dark bars
terms.effect: content borrows cinema's authority, a screening moment
terms.use_when: one key image or video per page, letterboxed stills as chapter dividers

terms.def: centered small-caps role/name pairs in strict columns
terms.effect: ceremonial closure, everyone becomes cast
terms.use_when: team/thanks/speaker roster at page end

terms.def: a key at 45° high creating a triangle of light on the shadow cheek
terms.effect: classical painterly credibility
terms.use_when: the single main instructor or founder portrait

terms.def: light behind the subject tracing a bright silhouette line
terms.effect: sculptural premium-tech pop from darkness (Apple look)
terms.use_when: dark-mode product or deliverable heroes

terms.def: a binary policy, small source for crisp shadows or diffused for gentle gradients
terms.effect: hard equals graphic punch, soft equals calm trust, one temperament for all photos
terms.use_when: set once so the set feels art-directed

terms.def: warm low-angle long-shadow light after sunrise or before sunset
terms.effect: instant warmth, nostalgia, optimism
terms.use_when: lifestyle/outcome imagery, closing sections before CTA

terms.def: deep-blue ambient dusk or dawn light mixed with warm artificial lights
terms.effect: cinematic night-shift dedication mood
terms.use_when: grind/problem sections, live-at-night framing

terms.def: shadow dominates, the subject minimally and selectively lit
terms.effect: mystery, exclusivity, insider-knowledge mood
terms.use_when: what-most-people-dont-know or closed-door method sections

terms.def: bright, low-contrast, shadow-minimal on light sets
terms.effect: openness, honesty, nothing-to-hide register
terms.use_when: pricing/guarantee/refund sections, welcoming instructor imagery

terms.def: objects arranged and shot from directly overhead at 90°
terms.effect: inventory-as-story, casually credible completeness
terms.use_when: 무엇을 받게 되나, photograph the actual kit

terms.def: disciplined flat-lay, like objects grouped, every edge at 90°, no overlap
terms.effect: obsessive order equals professional rigor
terms.use_when: curriculum/toolkit for technical audiences

terms.def: a dominant product image shot macro, material detail larger than life
terms.effect: engineered, inspectable, detail equals confidence
terms.use_when: top-of-page/offer for physical or rich digital deliverables

terms.def: subjects in their real context of use, actual workspace, lived-in scene
terms.effect: the viewer projects themselves in, context persuades
terms.use_when: audience-identification, instructor credibility

terms.def: screen design composited into a photographed real device in a real scene
terms.effect: software becomes an object in the world
terms.use_when: every screenshot the page must show

terms.def: objects deliberately arranged and lit with a long sharp cast shadow as composition
terms.effect: someone spent an afternoon lighting it, the shadow proves 3D
terms.use_when: deliverables, kits, books, colored seamless grounds

terms.def: on-camera hard flash, candid framing, slight overexposure
terms.effect: immediacy and honesty, anti-corporate cool
terms.use_when: behind-the-scenes, 현장의 하루 real moments

terms.def: the subject small and off-center against a large empty field
terms.effect: calm scale, the emptiness doubles as typographic space
terms.use_when: heroes that must carry a headline, breathing sections

terms.def: unposed process documentation, hands, screens mid-task, whiteboards
terms.effect: this actually happens, strongest 증명 for education
terms.use_when: replace every repeated mockup with photos of the tool in use

terms.def: high-ISO grainy black-and-white in the Magnum tradition
terms.effect: gravity and truth-claim, history being recorded
terms.use_when: origin-story, the problem is real

terms.def: instant-film white borders, thick bottom margin, handwriting, slight rotation
terms.effect: kept-snapshot warmth, anti-corporate
terms.use_when: community/후기 sections

terms.def: objects imaged on a flatbed scanner, razor-sharp shallow plane, black falloff
terms.effect: clinical-poetic specimen look, objects become archival evidence
terms.use_when: course materials, notes, tools as artifacts

terms.def: slow shutter, moving elements blur while static stays sharp
terms.effect: elapsed time frozen, the room was alive
terms.use_when: live-event proof, instructor sharp, note-taking hands flowing

terms.def: top-down work-in-progress table with natural overlap, crumbs, coffee rings
terms.effect: you are standing at this desk, unglamorous-honest process
terms.use_when: 하루 일과, process walkthroughs

terms.def: real hands interacting with product or screen in every feasible shot
terms.effect: scale, ownership, warmth, a held object is real
terms.use_when: every deliverable shot, phone held, workbook written-in

terms.def: unposed documentary of the making, setup, rehearsal, mistakes
terms.effect: transparency as persuasion
terms.use_when: instructor-trust, pre-launch, 준비 과정 공개

terms.def: a sharp mirror-reflection of the light source on glossy surfaces
terms.effect: communicates material finish, which flat rendering cannot
terms.use_when: direct product shoots, keep a controlled specular

terms.def: studio lights through colored gels painting the scene photographically
terms.effect: bold committed color with depth, falloff, shadow, color as light
terms.use_when: when the brand demands a strong color field, shoot the color

terms.def: a curved cornerless studio backdrop, infinite ground with a soft gradient
terms.effect: real-yet-abstract space, even the plain background is photographic
terms.use_when: product/portrait sets needing clean-but-photographic grounds

terms.def: deliberate secondary objects building narrative around the subject
terms.effect: context whispers the story, whose desk, what taste
terms.use_when: any staged photo, brief 3-5 named props

terms.def: shot against the light, the subject a dark shape on a bright ground
terms.effect: poster-like drama, identity reduced to aspirational gesture
terms.use_when: closing become-this-person imagery before final CTA

terms.def: gradual edge darkening, natively from fast lenses
terms.effect: the eye funneled to center, intimate, optical
terms.use_when: subtle on portraits and testimonials

terms.def: two exposures in one frame, a portrait filled with landscape or texture
terms.effect: poetic person-by-subject fusion
terms.use_when: concept-heavy transformation heroes

terms.def: real paper artifacts, tickets, receipts, notes, tape, flatbed-scanned as evidence
terms.effect: forensic authenticity, a scrapbook of a real history
terms.use_when: 증명/story, scan the actual handwritten notes and real badge; requires >=1 captured artifact — simulated-only pastiche is banned (tell #21 instance)

terms.def: photography plus hand-drawn marks plus cut paper plus type scraps in one composition
terms.effect: human hand visibly present, zine-like, unrepeatable
terms.use_when: hero/section headers for creator audiences

terms.def: real marker or pencil circles, arrows, underlines over photos or screens
terms.effect: a teacher personally pointed at this part
terms.use_when: screenshot walkthroughs, curriculum highlights

terms.def: the coherent universe a brand's artifacts imply, places, rituals, objects, vocabulary
terms.effect: every asset feels excerpted from one continuous reality
terms.use_when: before any page, write 5 lines of the world

terms.def: one governing concept sentence every choice must serve, with a non-web referent
terms.effect: styled vs directed, coherence with a point of view
terms.use_when: write 이 페이지는 ___처럼 보인다 before tokens

terms.def: the full recognizability system, color, type voice, layout habits, image treatment, motion
terms.effect: the brand survives the crop test
terms.use_when: audit, hide the logo, could it be anyone's

terms.def: one ownable repeatable device derived from the brand's meaning, used in 3+ roles
terms.effect: recognition compounds, sections cohere through the motif
terms.use_when: derive from subject, records to a date-stamp mark

terms.def: verbal personality specified in do/don't pairs, one castable speaker
terms.effect: mixed registers are a subtle AI tell
terms.use_when: pick the speaker, rewrite every heading in that mouth

terms.def: tagline is an emotional stance, descriptor is plain functional naming, distinct slots
terms.effect: clarity and feeling coexist
terms.use_when: hero lockup, descriptor small near masthead, tagline at display size

terms.def: a rules-first icon set, or the explicit decision to use none
terms.effect: feature-icon rows are core AI-slop furniture
terms.use_when: consider replacing icons with numerals, photographs, or typographic marks

terms.def: a committed named drawing style, tool, line weight, palette, era
terms.effect: illustration becomes a brand asset
terms.use_when: only when a real style is affordable, like 1970s 과학교과서 도해

terms.def: the brand's owned 3-5 surface treatments reused everywhere
terms.effect: sections feel printed by the same shop on the same stock
terms.use_when: assemble once per brand, reuse across campaigns

terms.def: a fixed skeleton plus a deliberately variable element per context
terms.effect: alive and collectible while recognizable
terms.use_when: recurring event series, 제N호 constant frame with a varying fill

terms.def: the first viewport is one falsifiable claim plus one evidence plus one action, nothing else
terms.effect: 3-second comprehension, everything below proves the thesis
terms.use_when: write the sentence before visuals

terms.def: rank exactly what exists in the first viewport, mobile-first
terms.effect: prevents first-screen inflation, 3초의 매력 decides read-through
terms.use_when: every build

terms.def: the lower-third arc reachable one-handed, targets 48px+
terms.effect: effortless CTA taps
terms.use_when: mobile CTA/sticky placement

terms.def: a persistent bottom bar with price/deadline plus CTA, appearing after the hero
terms.effect: a zero-cost conversion path at any depth
terms.use_when: pages over ~5 viewports, suppress in hero

terms.def: section volumes scored like music before building, dense/sparse, dark/light, tall/short
terms.effect: scroll fatigue vanishes, each section lands by contrasting its neighbor
terms.use_when: storyboard the volume curve first

terms.def: one unambiguous #1 focal point per viewport with a measurable drop to #2 and #3
terms.effect: instant legibility of intent
terms.use_when: QA per viewport, if #1 isn't obvious in 1s demote something

terms.def: a slim persistent in-page nav of section names, position-highlighted
terms.effect: long pages become explorable documents
terms.use_when: 8+ sections, comparison-shopping products

terms.def: an opening beat arresting scroll in ~3s, a specific scene, number, or contrarian claim
terms.effect: determines read-through of everything below
terms.use_when: lead with the reader's own moment, product name arrives later

terms.def: the customer's pain narrated in their own concrete detail before any solution
terms.effect: 내 얘기다 recognition, earns the right to pitch
terms.use_when: after hook, written from real interviews

terms.def: a single pivot where the product enters as the answer to the exact pain just narrated
terms.effect: relief dynamics, the page's key change
terms.use_when: once, after 공감 peaks, visually discontinuous

terms.def: evidence in ascending specificity, numbers to dated testimonials to third-party records to footnotes
terms.effect: converts the skeptical majority, the gradient matters
terms.use_when: after 해결, screenshots as scanned evidence

terms.def: CTAs at emotional peaks only, verb varying by readiness
terms.effect: asking at the right beats reads confident
terms.use_when: 3 or fewer in-flow CTAs plus a sticky bar

terms.def: Problem-Agitation-Solution-Offer-Narrowing-Action persuasion spine
terms.effect: a tested sequence, each stage maps to a design register
terms.use_when: as the section skeleton before design

terms.def: institutional marks, 인증, 수상, 언론 로고, 보증
terms.effect: borrowed authority, rainbow rows are a 스마트스토어 tell
terms.use_when: one monochrome row near price/CTA, real, dated, linked

terms.def: Wadiz option laddering, early-bird, quantity caps, bundles, per-tier 혜택
terms.effect: anchoring and urgency through structure, not red banners
terms.use_when: 2-4 tiers, one recommended, caps as facts

terms.def: us-vs-alternatives with criteria honest but favorable, conceding at least one cell
terms.effect: does the shopper's homework, most-revisited block
terms.use_when: vs 독학/유튜브/타강의

terms.def: a first-person account of why the maker built this, failures included, real artifacts
terms.effect: parasocial trust, Wadiz funding hinges on maker credibility
terms.use_when: mid-page after proof, manuscript grid plus drop cap plus scanned artifacts

terms.def: red countdown timers, rainbow badge rows, drop-shadow card grids, 형광 강조, 100% 만족 claims
terms.effect: reads 저가 오픈마켓, caps the price point
terms.use_when: a hard ban-list at QA

terms.def: small English editorial labels legitimate at 1-2 per page, one style, the brand's text face
terms.effect: at 1-2 imported-magazine sophistication, at every section the cosplay tell
terms.use_when: masthead area plus at most one divider

terms.def: webzine-like brand storytelling, full-bleed photography, long-form copy, interview beats, commerce at the end
terms.effect: selling by world-building, documented multi-x sales lifts
terms.use_when: structural referent for premium 상세페이지, story first and buy module last

terms.def: a product isolated (배경 제거) on a designed color field with a real or drawn shadow kept
terms.effect: photographic realness plus full layout control
terms.use_when: offer stacks, price sections

terms.def: stochastic luminance noise mimicking emulsion, over images and flat color fields
terms.effect: time, air, physicality, a grained field no longer reads vector flood
terms.use_when: 3-6% monochrome over large flats, photos, dark mood sections

terms.def: tone via variable-size printed dots (newspaper/comic)
terms.effect: newsprint mechanical warmth, images become artifacts
terms.use_when: retro-editorial photo treatment, dot gradients as graphics

terms.def: matte fibrous paper emulation, softened blacks, dot gain, fiber, or a scanned texture multiplied low-opacity
terms.effect: the page becomes a printed thing, outlaws shadow and glow
terms.use_when: whole-page finish for editorial/heritage, over brand-color bands

terms.def: riso duplicator signatures, fluoro spot inks, flat grainy layers, slight misregistration, overprint
terms.effect: zine warmth, hand-run physicality, imperfection as process proof
terms.use_when: community/indie tones, badges, illustrations

terms.def: color plates deliberately offset so edges fringe cyan or magenta
terms.effect: print-shop humanity, motion-blur energy on static type
terms.use_when: one display headline or numeral, a plate a few px off

terms.def: a gradient rendered with heavy dithered noise, sprayed not smooth
terms.effect: analog spray-paint blends instead of digital ramps
terms.use_when: backgrounds, section transitions, a sprayed halo behind the price

terms.def: type or marks with subtle debossed pressed-into-surface shading
terms.effect: tactile luxury, manufactured not composited
terms.use_when: seal moments, ticket-stub CTA, certificate-like guarantees

terms.def: a flat unblurred single-color shadow offset (neobrutalist print idiom)
terms.effect: sticker/print pop without gloss
terms.use_when: one interactive element family, only if the page has zero other shadows

terms.def: a frame-filling photo of a material surface, patina, weave, grain, paper tooth
terms.effect: pure tactility, a sense of touch with zero informational content
terms.use_when: section-break interstitials, backgrounds where AI would place flat color

terms.def: manuscript-and-early-print practice of setting section openings and heads in red ink within the text face itself, no chip, no box, no mono garnish
terms.effect: section markers become articulation native to the document genre, one ink change carries the whole hierarchy
terms.use_when: replacing mono kickers, coverlines and 기록 NN labels on document/archival pages, pairs with an existing 인주-vermilion accent so the marker and the seal share one ink

terms.ko: 명명 서체 스택(시스템 명조 폴백 금지)
terms.def: display type declared and load-verified as a named licensed KR face (산돌 정체/SD 정체, 순바탕, Noto Serif KR), with the system-serif fallback class (AppleMyungjo 류) excluded from font-family so a failed webfont can never silently substitute
terms.effect: the hero reads typeset by intent, kills filter-over-fallback fake lettering and the glyph accidents it causes
terms.use_when: every display myeongjo or lettering moment, verify the webfont actually painted (document.fonts.check) before shipping, never feTurbulence over an unnamed serif as a lettering substitute

terms.def: a before/after or then/now pair set as one spread with deliberately unequal panels (70/30 or 60/40), the dominant panel carries the argued side and the minor panel is the foil
terms.effect: the size ratio itself is the editorial opinion, comparison reads authored instead of a symmetric twin-box template
terms.use_when: 지금까지/이제부터, before/after, us/them pairs — never two equal-width bordered boxes

terms.def: the deadline restated as one quiet typeset fact line at a fixed folio or masthead position — date, time, seat cap as plain text with tabular figures, no box grid, no ticking cells, no red bomb
terms.effect: urgency reads as confident documented fact instead of countdown theatre, scarcity inherits the credibility of the document world
terms.use_when: replacing 4-box countdown grids in offer and CTA, set as a folio line like 모집 마감 — 7월 14일 자정, pair with condensed display if poster-scale urgency is needed

terms.def: initials or roles designed as a real engraved-seal system — one carved-style 인장 per entity with distinct cut, shared red-ink impression texture (번짐·눌림), varied sizes — never letter-square chips in a row and never a smooth vector ring
terms.effect: identity marks read carved and owned, roles become artifacts of the document world instead of framework fallback avatars
terms.use_when: team and role rosters (B/C/F/O류), approval marks, signature blocks — each seal differs in cut, all share one ink, impression texture is mandatory on every ground including mobile

terms.def: magazine-cover device — the 3-5 short info lines (일시·방식·정원·비용) set as ONE tight clustered block with thin rules, anchored to the masthead or a trim edge, never scattered down an empty rail
terms.effect: the hero's emptiness reads composed margin drama around a dense cluster instead of unfinished sparseness, info gains newsstand scannability
terms.use_when: hero rails carrying 3+ meta items under magazine-cover-logic, the vacated side becomes deliberate 여백 for the focal mass
